findings.fix: Change the link target to '~/.claude/skills/code-writing/SKILL.md' to match the Task 1 pattern.

cross_task.check: Critical findings from iteration 1 — scope overlap Tasks 1/3
cross_task.result: RESOLVED. Task 1 now owns only registry functions (disable_location_services / restore_location_services). All cleanup integration — CLEANUP_LABEL_LOCATION_SERVICES constant, _VALID_CLEANUP_LABELS addition, _execute_cleanup_by_label branch, ProxyState field, main.py startup call, cleanup() wiring — is exclusively in Task 3. Details section in Task 1 explicitly states it does NOT touch cleanup(), _execute_cleanup_by_label(), _VALID_CLEANUP_LABELS, or ProxyState.

cross_task.check: Critical finding from iteration 1 — TDD Anchor misplacement in Task 1
cross_task.result: RESOLVED. test_proxystate_backward_compat and test_cleanup_retry_location_services are no longer in Task 1's TDD Anchor. They appear in Task 3's TDD Anchor where they belong.

cross_task.result: RESOLVED. Task 6 Context Files now includes test/test_system_config_location.py. Details also explicitly enumerates all required test coverage including Location Services registry tests from Task 1.

cross_task.check: Minor finding from iteration 1 — TDD Anchor coordinate assertion in Task 2
cross_task.result: RESOLVED. test_request_intercepts_geolocation_api now explicitly requires asserting exact float equality against the preset's latitude/longitude values, not just key presence.

cross_task.check: Dependency graph — cycles and wave ordering
cross_task.result: VALID. No cycles. Wave ordering: Task 1/2 (wave 1, no deps), Task 3 (wave 2, depends_on [1]), Tasks 4/5/6 (wave 3, depends_on [1,2,3]), Task 7 (wave 4, depends_on [4,5,6]). All depends_on point to tasks in lower waves.

VALID. Tasks 1/2/3 use code-writing with code-reviewer + security-auditor + test-reviewer. Tasks 4-7 are self-verifying (audit/QA) with reviewers=[]; each uses the appropriate audit skill (code-reviewing, security-auditor, test-master, pre-deploy-qa).

cross_task.check: Carry-forward from tech-spec — AC and TDD Anchors
cross_task.result: VALID. All tech-spec acceptance criteria are carried forward: registry read-before-write, restore validation, non-Windows no-op, cleanup label pattern, geolocation-only JS on non-target, proxy API intercept with exact match, permissions.query scope, CSP skip guard, error handling, ProxyState backward compat. TDD Anchor tests map to all tech-spec Testing Strategy unit and integration test entries.

cross_task.result: VALID. Tasks 4-7 are audit/QA tasks producing JSON reports, not code. None have a TDD Anchor section.
